---
# ── REQUIRED ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draft: true                          # Set false when ready to publish
title: "Visualisation title"
description: "One-sentence summary shown in the listing grid and SEO."
date: 2026-01-01
date-modified: 2026-01-01

# ── HOME PAGE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Set true to pin this item in the featured Portfolio section on the home page.
# Pinned items appear before the most-recent auto-selection.
highlight: false

# ── TAXONOMY ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# First category drives the listing filter bar in portfolio.qmd.
# Active filter buttons: Visualisation, Dataset, Code, Artefact, Interactive
categories: [Visualisation, Interactive, Tableau]

# ── IMAGE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Used as the card thumbnail in the listing grid.
# For Tableau: use a screenshot saved in an img/ subfolder next to this file.
# For SVG placeholders: ../../assets/images/img-network.svg
image: ../../assets/images/img-network.svg

# ── PAGE FORMAT ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Use full for Tableau embeds (removes page max-width constraint).
# Use article for text-heavy portfolio items (dataset, code, artefact).
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full               # full | article
---

[← Back to Portfolio](../../portfolio.html){.back-link}

::: {.label}
Type · Context · Data source · Year
:::

<!-- ── OPENING ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  1–2 paragraphs: what this shows, why it exists, what question it answers.
  Write for a reader who knows your field but hasn't seen this specific work.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

Opening description — what the visualisation shows and why it was built.

## How to read it

Describe the chart type, filters, colour encoding, and what the key patterns mean.

## Data

Data source, publication date, geographic/temporal coverage.

<!-- ── TABLEAU EMBED ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Replace viz-XXXX with a unique numeric ID (e.g. 2010, 2011…).
  Replace WorkbookName/SheetName with the values from your Tableau Public URL.
  The static_image folder is the first 2 characters of the workbook name.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

::: {.column-screen}

```{=html}
<div class="tableauPlaceholder" id="viz-XXXX" style="position: relative">
  <noscript>
    <a href="https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/edgar.rodriguez.huerta/viz/WorkbookName/SheetName">
      <img alt="SheetName"
           src="https://public.tableau.com/static/images/Wo/WorkbookName/SheetName/1_rss.png"
           style="border: none">
    </a>
  </noscript>
  <object class="tableauViz" style="display:none;">
    <param name="host_url"            value="https%3A%2F%2Fpublic.tableau.com%2F">
    <param name="embed_code_version"  value="3">
    <param name="site_root"           value="">
    <param name="name"                value="WorkbookName/SheetName">
    <param name="tabs"                value="no">
    <param name="toolbar"             value="yes">
    <param name="static_image"        value="https://public.tableau.com/static/images/Wo/WorkbookName/SheetName/1.png">
    <param name="animate_transition"  value="yes">
    <param name="display_static_image" value="yes">
    <param name="display_spinner"     value="yes">
    <param name="display_overlay"     value="yes">
    <param name="display_count"       value="yes">
    <param name="language"            value="en-GB">
  </object>
</div>
<script type="text/javascript">
  var divElement = document.getElementById('viz-XXXX');
  var vizElement = divElement.getElementsByTagName('object')[0];
  if (divElement.offsetWidth > 800)      { vizElement.style.width = '100%'; vizElement.style.height = '827px'; }
  else if (divElement.offsetWidth > 500) { vizElement.style.width = '100%'; vizElement.style.height = '827px'; }
  else                                   { vizElement.style.width = '100%'; vizElement.style.height = '727px'; }
  var scriptElement = document.createElement('script');
  scriptElement.src = 'https://public.tableau.com/javascripts/api/viz_v1.js';
  vizElement.parentNode.insertBefore(scriptElement, vizElement);
</script>
```

:::

<!-- ── OPTIONAL LINKS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Link to related project, paper, or dataset.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

## Related

- [Project page](../../projects/project-name.html)
- [Paper DOI](https://doi.org/...)
